flashcards.back:
Functional: What system DOES
- Features, functions, behaviors

Non-Functional: How system PERFORMS
- Performance, security, reliability
- Also called quality attributes

1. Feasibility Study
2. Elicitation (gather)
3. Analysis (understand)
4. Specification (document)
5. Validation (verify)
6. Management (maintain)

S - Specific
M - Measurable
A - Achievable
R - Relevant
T - Time-bound

- Performance (speed, throughput)
- Security (protection, privacy)
- Reliability (availability)
- Usability (ease of use)
- Scalability (growth)
- Maintainability (modification)
